_publications._publicationTitle: Tumor suppressor alterations cooperate to drive aggressive mesotheliomas with enriched cancer stem cells via a p53-miR-34a-c-Met axis.

_contextSnippet: Moreover, both total c-Met protein expression and phosphorylation/activation were elevated in MM cells from Nf2+/−;p16/p19+/− mice
details: Successfully detected upregulated c-Met protein expression in MM cells from Nf2+/−;p16/p19+/− mice compared to WT mice
